reasoning: The control PM-31-e focuses on continuous monitoring and response actions based on monitoring results. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary events, including API server interactions. Additionally, configuring alerting for changes in network policies aligns with monitoring network configurations. These checks ensure that Kubernetes clusters have mechanisms to monitor and respond to security-relevant events.
title: Continuous Monitoring Strategy - Response actions to address results...
